name: ice40_bram_inference_boundary_size
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog memory array declaration with size [0:(512*N)-1] where N is a value in {23, 27, 31}, which triggers an off-by-one boundary bug in Yosys synth_ice40 BRAM inference causing incorrect extra BRAM allocation.
snippet: reg [7:0] mem [0:(512*NUM_BRAMS)-1]; // NUM_BRAMS in {23, 27, 31} triggers synth_ice40 bug

name: ice40_bram_size_formula_8n_minus_1
description: Code should include a BRAM count parameter that equals 8*n-1 (e.g., 23, 27, 31), which when used in memory size calculation (512 * (8*n-1)) triggers synth_ice40 incorrect BRAM inference.
snippet:
localparam NUM_BRAMS = 27; // 8*n-1 pattern triggers bug
reg [7:0] mem [0:(512*NUM_BRAMS)-1];
